postReview.title: Philadelphia Union 3-2 LA Galaxy: Baribo snatches last-gasp victory to pile misery on visitors
postReview.description: LA Galaxy had a 2-0 lead at half-time against Philadelphia Union, but failed to impose themselves in the second half at Subaru Park.

preReview.title: Philadelphia Union v LA Galaxy: Vanney looking to recover from 'rock bottom'
preReview.description: Greg Vanney is desperate for a response as LA Galaxy travel to the Philadelphia Union on Wednesday in MLS.
